title: SAGE-Kit Runtime State Snapshot v1
description: A language-neutral run-state data boundary. Schema presence does not create .sagekit, does not write runtime files, does not acquire a lock or lease, does not start a scheduler, does not recover a run, does not modify ACTIVE_CONTEXT, does not modify project history, and does not execute a Graph.

schema_id.description: Stable identity of the Runtime State Snapshot v1 boundary.

schema_version.description: Version of this state snapshot data boundary.

run_id.description: Stable repository-neutral run identity. Generation is deferred to Stage 3B.

graph_digest.description: Stage 2B canonical graph digest. The Graph payload remains an immutable Graph Contract v1 snapshot outside this state object.

graph_generation.description: Observed Graph Contract v1 generation; it grants no graph mutation authority.

revision.description: Non-negative state revision label. This schema does not increment or persist it.

last_event_sequence.description: Last observable event sequence represented by this snapshot; zero permits an initialized pre-event boundary.

run_status.description: Observable aggregate run status only. This schema defines no run transition behavior.

authority_id.description: Reference to existing run authority; it does not copy, create, or upgrade authority.

controller_id.description: Observable controller identity; it grants no writer, scheduling, gate, or execution authority.

node_states.description: Bounded node-state facts. Cross-item graph membership and node identity uniqueness remain validator concerns outside this schema.

handoff_ref.description: Optional reference to configured ACTIVE_CONTEXT or a bounded handoff artifact; never copied handoff content.

recovery_status.description: Optional observable recovery label only. It does not initiate recovery or decide continuation.

node_id.description: Opaque Graph Contract v1 node identity reference. It is preserved exactly and is bounded by the canonical state resource limit.

status.description: Stage 2 node status fact. Stage 2B pure validation remains the sole owner of transition rules; this schema defines none.

attempt_id.description: Run- and node-scoped attempt identity. Null is permitted before an attempt starts; the identity does not grant repeat execution authority.

last_event_sequence.description: Last event sequence observably associated with this node state.

result_digest.description: Optional bounded reference to an externally defined result digest; no digest algorithm is created here.

evidence_refs.description: Bounded evidence references, never embedded evidence tables, output, or transcripts.

blocker_reason.description: Bounded single-line observable blocker summary, not private reasoning or a transcript.
